# Claude Certified Architects

> Independent practice-exam platform and study resource for Anthropic's Claude Certified Architect (CCA) Foundations certification. Not affiliated with, authorized by, or endorsed by Anthropic.

Claude Certified Architects (claudecertifiedarchitects.com) provides unofficial practice materials for the CCA Foundations exam: a 400-question scenario-based question bank, a full-length 60-question/120-minute timed exam simulation, a free 10-question diagnostic quiz, an exam guide, and a blog covering all 5 CCA exam domains (Agentic Architecture & Orchestration, Claude Code Configuration & Workflow, Prompt Engineering & Structured Output, Tool Design & MCP, and Context Management & Reliability). The CCA Foundations exam uses a 100-1,000 scaled score with a passing score of 720. 'Claude' and 'Claude Certified Architect' are trademarks of their respective owner.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/): Overview of the practice platform, practice modes, and entry point to the question bank.
- [CCA Foundations Exam Simulation](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/cca-foundations-exam/): Full-length, 60-question, 120-minute timed practice exam covering all 5 domains with a scored breakdown.
- [Free Practice Questions](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/cca-practice-questions/): 400 scenario-based practice questions with explanations across all 5 domains and multiple test modes.
- [Exam Guide](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/cca-exam-guide/): Exam format, domain weights, passing score (720/1,000), and study strategies.
- [Free Diagnostic Quiz](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/diagnostic/): 10-question, no-login readiness check with a per-domain score.
- [Official Exam Registration](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/register/): How to register for the official CCA Foundations exam via Anthropic's Skilljar portal.
- [Blog](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/): Articles on CCA exam prep, the 5 exam domains, certification value, and Claude agent development.

## CCA Exam Domain Guides

- [Domain 1: Agentic Architecture & Orchestration (27%)](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/agentic-architecture-orchestration-cca-domain-1/): The highest-weighted domain — agent design patterns, orchestration, and common exam traps.
- [Domain 2: Claude Code Configuration & Workflow (20%)](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/claude-code-config-workflows-cca-domain-2/): CLAUDE.md, project setup, and workflow scenarios.
- [Domain 3: Prompt Engineering & Structured Output (20%)](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/prompt-engineering-structured-output-cca-domain-3/): Prompt design, structured output, and the PRECISE framework.
- [Domain 4: Tool Design & MCP (18%)](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/tool-design-mcp-cca-domain-4/): MCP server architecture, tool schema design, and tool-granularity scenarios.
- [Domain 5: Context Management & Reliability (15%)](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/context-management-reliability-cca-domain-5/): Token budgets, caching strategies, and long-conversation reliability.
- [The 5 CCA Foundations Exam Domains Explained](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/cca-foundations-exam-domains-explained/): Domain weights, key topics, and what to study for each domain.
- [Claude Certified Architect Exam Guide 2026](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/cca-foundations-exam-guide-2026/): Domain weights, sample questions, and a study timeline.
- [CCA Exam Study Schedule: 30-Day Preparation Plan](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/cca-exam-study-schedule-30-day-plan/): Weekly breakdowns and daily focus areas for a 30-day study plan.
- [10 Free CCA Practice Questions With Explanations](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/cca-foundations-exam-practice-questions-free/): Sample questions across all five domains with answer explanations.
- [CCA Exam Anti-Patterns: 7 Mistakes That Fail Candidates](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/cca-exam-anti-patterns/): Architectural anti-patterns that commonly appear on the exam.
- [How Hard Is the Claude Foundations Certification?](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/how-hard-is-cca-foundations-exam/): A realistic difficulty assessment and where most candidates lose points.

## Certification Value & Career

- [Is the Claude Certified Architect Certification Worth It?](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/claude-certified-architect-certification-worth-it/): Cost, benefits, and who should pursue the CCA.
- [Why Claude Certification Is Important in 2026](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/why-claude-certification-is-important/): What the CCA verifies and why employers are starting to ask for it.
- [How to Become a Claude Certified Architect (2026)](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/how-to-become-claude-certified-architect/): Career path, job roles, and what hiring managers look for.
- [Claude Certified Architect Salary and Career Outlook in 2026](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/claude-certified-architect-salary-career-2026/): Salary data and how the credential affects hiring.
- [What Does a Claude Certified Architect Actually Do? Roles & Day-to-Day](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/cca-real-world-reports-responsibilities-salaries/): First-hand accounts from credential holders on day-to-day responsibilities.
- [AI Engineer Certifications Worth Getting in 2026](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/ai-engineer-certifications-2026/): Which AI certifications signal real skills and how to prioritize them.
- [CCA vs AWS AI Practitioner: Which Certification to Choose](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/cca-vs-aws-ai-practitioner-which-certification/): A comparison of scope, difficulty, and salary impact.

## Claude Development Skills

- [What's the Best Way to Learn to Build AI Agents with Claude?](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/how-to-learn-claude-agent-development/): A structured learning path for building production-grade Claude agents.
- [How to Write an Effective CLAUDE.md File](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/blog/how-to-write-effective-claude-md-file/): Practical guide with examples, common mistakes, and exam-relevant tips.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.claudecertifiedarchitects.com/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable URLs with last-modified dates.
